indexName: Nifty India Manufacturing Total Return Index

holdings.name: Larsen & Toubro
holdings.description: India's largest engineering and construction conglomerate. Defence, railways, nuclear, green hydrogen projects. Rs 5+ lakh Cr order backlog.

holdings.name: Siemens India
holdings.description: Digital industries, smart infrastructure and mobility. Power T&D, railway systems and building automation. Germany-parent technology transfer.

holdings.name: ABB India
holdings.description: Power grids, industrial automation and robotics. Electrification products for India's transformer and motor market. High-margin short-cycle products.

holdings.name: HAL
holdings.description: India's sole military aircraft manufacturer. LCA Tejas, Dhruv helicopter, HTT-40 trainer. Rs 1.3 lakh Cr order book with export optionality.

holdings.name: Bharat Electronics
holdings.description: Radar, sonar, electronic warfare, communication systems for India's armed forces. Rs 65,000 Cr order book. Exports to 25+ countries.

holdings.name: Bharat Forge
holdings.description: Global leader in forged components for trucks, cars and industrial applications. Defence vehicle components growing. European and North American supply chain.

holdings.name: Kaynes Technology
holdings.description: Aerospace, defence and medical electronics manufacturing services. ITAR-certified Indian EMS company for US defence contracts.

holdings.name: Thermax
holdings.description: Energy and environment engineering. Boilers, heat exchangers, chillers. Green hydrogen equipment for industrial decarbonisation.

holdings.name: Dixon Technologies
holdings.description: PLI scheme electronics manufacturer. Smartphones, LED TVs, washing machines, set-top boxes. India's largest CE contract manufacturer.

holdings.name: CG Power
holdings.description: Transformers, switchgear, motors and railway traction systems. Murugappa Group turnaround. Railway electrification boom driving order inflows.
